title: micromeria cristata subsp. kosaninii
intro: Micromeria cristata subsp. kosaninii is a subspecies of the Micromeria cristata plant, a type of flowering plant in the mint family, native to the Balkan Peninsula. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Micromeria cristata subsp. kosaninii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
